tasks.title: Create lib/Service/Integration/Providers/XwikiProvider.php
tasks.description: Provider class with id='xwiki', label='Articles', icon='FileDocumentMultiple', group='external', requiredApp=null, storage='external', getOpenConnectorSource()='xwiki'.

tasks.title: Declare auth requirements (basic or oauth2, configurable at source level)
tasks.description: XwikiProvider::authRequirements() returns the OpenConnector source's declared auth type. Basic auth and OAuth2 both supported depending on customer XWiki version.

tasks.title: Delegate CRUD to ExternalIntegrationRouter
tasks.description: All CRUD methods on XwikiProvider delegate to ExternalIntegrationRouter (from the umbrella). Provider stays thin; routing logic stays in the umbrella's router.

tasks.title: Ship OpenConnector source config template config/openconnector-sources/xwiki.yaml
tasks.description: YAML template declaring the xWiki source: base URL, auth type, headers (Accept: application/json), pagination shape. Admins import this once.

tasks.title: DI-tag the provider
tasks.description: Register XwikiProvider as DI-tagged service in lib/AppInfo/Application.php so IntegrationRegistry picks it up automatically.

tasks.title: Unit tests (OpenConnector client mocked)
tasks.description: tests/Unit/Service/Integration/Providers/XwikiProviderTest.php — at least 5 test methods: registration, auth requirements, list pages, get page, missing-page exception.

tasks.title: CnXwikiTab.vue — linked pages with title + full breadcrumb
tasks.description: Tab component listing linked xWiki pages. Each row shows title + full breadcrumb (Wiki / Department / Subspace / Page). Link-by-URL (parses to space.page) or link-by-path. Unlink action. Auth-expired banner.

tasks.title: Barrel + tests
tasks.description: src/components/CnXwikiTab/index.js export + tests/components/CnXwikiTab.test.js covering link-by-URL parsing, breadcrumb rendering, auth-expired banner.
tasks.spec_ref: specs/generic-integrations/spec.md#Scenario: Paste URL resolves to canonical reference

tasks.title: CnXwikiCard.vue — 4 surfaces with detail-page text preview
tasks.description: Widget rendering across umbrella surfaces: user-dashboard (recent linked pages), app-dashboard (scoped to app), detail-page (linked pages + 500-char text preview + link to full page, macros stripped), single-entity (page-title + breadcrumb chip).

tasks.title: Barrel + surface tests
tasks.description: Index export + tests covering all four surfaces. Security test: confirm macros are stripped, no <script> in preview output.

tasks.title: src/integrations/builtin/xwiki.js — register with referenceType: 'xwiki'
tasks.description: Frontend registry entry declaring the xWiki integration: tab + widget components, label, icon, group='external', referenceType='xwiki' so schema reference properties can render a chip.

tasks.title: Parity gate, nl+en translations, strict checks, ESLint
tasks.description: scripts/check-integration-parity.sh passes (tab + widget both present). nl + en translations added for all user-facing strings. composer check:strict passes. npm run lint passes.

tasks.title: E2E: configure OpenConnector xwiki source, link a page, verify breadcrumb in tab + text preview on detail-page
tasks.description: End-to-end test running against a real xWiki instance (the dev environment's openregister-xwiki container). Configures the OpenConnector source, links a page, asserts breadcrumb in tab, asserts 500-char preview on detail-page surface.

tasks.title: Link-by-URL test: paste full URL, verify resolution to canonical space.page
tasks.description: Unit test for the URL parser. Pasting https://wiki.example/xwiki/bin/view/Dept/Policy/Privacy resolves to space='Dept.Policy', page='Privacy'.
tasks.spec_ref: specs/generic-integrations/spec.md#Scenario: Paste URL resolves to canonical reference

tasks.title: Auth test, hide test, reference-property test
tasks.description: Test auth-expired banner when source credentials fail. Test that the provider is hidden from the registry when its OpenConnector source is missing or disabled. Test reference-property rendering of an xwiki chip in CnFormDialog.

tasks.title: Security: verify XWiki macros are NOT executed in preview (text-only)
tasks.description: Render a linked page containing a {{velocity}} macro. Confirm the macro is stripped from the preview text. Confirm no <script> or executable markup is included in the output. ADR-005 compliance.
